description: Estimate lift point loading, bag contact area and capture rhythm.
placeholderLabel: Placeholder rule. Link to actual citations after uploading your manuals.
warnings: Confirm load stability before each lift increment.

Set {liftPoints} lift point(s) and distribute load across contact surfaces.
